living-abstract.essence: Deep mastery of git internals - plumbing beneath porcelain
living-abstract.purpose: Infrastructure work: bare repos, worktrees, submodules, ref manipulation
living-abstract.ability: Bare clone patterns, worktree management, submodule control, ref manipulation
living-abstract.principle: Git = content-addressable filesystem (blobs, trees, commits, refs)
Bare repos are first-class, not server-only
